messages.content: Build a pure Decider for a BookLoan aggregate in TypeScript. Export initialState, decide, and evolve over discriminated unions for Command, Event, and State. Throw DomainError when returning an already closed loan.
What's the idiomatic TypeScript event-sourcing shape of a LibraryBranch Decider that opens, closes for holidays, and archives? Show a minimal example.

Write an event-sourced Decider for an AcquisitionOrder aggregate. Constraints: strict types, no any, exhaustive switch with never default, typed DomainError, reject receiving an order that was never placed.
Explain briefly how a Decider captures the invariants of a Periodical aggregate (issues are added and later published), then show a working typed implementation.
Add a 'suspend' capability to this ReadingGroup Decider so organisers can temporarily pause sessions without archiving the group. Keep the decide/evolve shape and add a typed SessionSuspended event.
Fix this ReferenceRequest decide to add the missing never default and reject answering a request that has been cancelled.
Build a projection that folds Catalog events into a flat CatalogView with title counts per genre. Include emptyView and a pure project(view, event) function.
What's the idiomatic way to build a read-model projection that tracks overdue BookLoan entries in TypeScript? Show project(view, event) with emptyView.
Explain briefly how a read-model projection differs from evolve, then show a typed Periodical subscriber view that counts active subscribers per title.

Write a read-model projection for a ReferenceRequest desk view. Constraints: strict types, emptyView is a frozen literal, project returns a new view on every call, and unrelated events pass through unchanged.

Build a versioned Snapshot loader for a BookLoan aggregate in TypeScript. Support v1 (renewals was missing) and v2 (patron field renamed from borrower). Export a CURRENT_VERSION constant and an upgradeSnapshot function.
How do I version a snapshot so a DigitalCopy aggregate can safely add a checksum field later? Show the pattern with two upgrader functions.

Write a snapshot loader for the Catalog aggregate. Constraints: Effect.gen for the async boundary, pure upgraders, CURRENT_VERSION constant, throw a typed UnsupportedSnapshotVersion when the version is unknown.
Build an appendToStream write path for AcquisitionOrder that uses expectedRevision and converts a store conflict signal into a typed ConcurrencyConflict error. Define a local EventStore interface.
How do I guard FineRecord writes against lost updates with expectedRevision in TypeScript? Show the read-decide-append loop and a typed ConcurrencyConflict.

Write an optimistic-concurrency wrapper for a LibraryBranch append using Effect.gen. Constraints: local EventStore interface, expectedRevision typed as bigint | 'no_stream' | 'any', fail with a typed ConcurrencyConflict when the store reports a conflict.
Build a CommandHandler for the Periodical aggregate that loads events, calls decide, and appends with expectedRevision. Define the local EventStore interface and the Decider trio.
What's the idiomatic TypeScript shape of a CommandHandler that loads a ReadingGroup stream, runs decide, and appends the resulting events? Show the minimum code.
Write a CommandHandler for AcquisitionOrder. Constraints: Effect.gen around the IO boundary, decide stays synchronous and pure, EventStore interface is local, handler does not inline business logic.
Explain the separation between decide and a CommandHandler, then implement one for ReferenceRequest that uses readStream and appendToStream.

Build a checkpointed subscription runner in TypeScript for InterlibraryRequest events. Define CheckpointStore, load the last checkpoint, apply events to a read model, and save the checkpoint AFTER applying.
How do I resume a projection subscription from a stored checkpoint for DigitalCopy events? Show a minimal runSubscription loop.
Write an Effect-wrapped checkpointed subscription for ReferenceRequest events. Constraints: Effect.gen on the async loop, persistence and checkpoint writes are both IO effects, project is pure.
Build a generic aggregateStream helper that folds an AsyncIterable of events into state, and use it with a LibraryBranch when(state, event) reducer in TypeScript.
What's the idiomatic TypeScript way to fold a stream of BookLoan events into state using an aggregateStream helper plus a pure when reducer? Show the minimal code.
Write an aggregateStream helper for FineRecord with Effect.gen wrapping the async loop. Constraints: two type parameters, pure when, no mutation of the input.
Explain briefly the difference between a projection's project and an aggregate's when, then show a typed aggregateStream that reuses when to reconstruct Catalog state.
Build an upcast(raw) function in TypeScript that migrates old BookLoan event shapes into current ones. Handle CheckedOut v1 (borrowerId) → v2 (patron) and throw UnknownEventError for unknown types.
How do I upcast an old AcquisitionOrder event shape to the current one at read time? Show a typed upcast(raw) with a UnknownEventError default.

Build a read model rebuild function for Catalog that reads events in batches from a resumable cursor, projects each batch, and persists the view. Include a `from` option so rebuilds resume after a crash.
How do I rebuild a DigitalCopy read model from revision 0 with a resumable cursor and progress reporting? Show a typed rebuild function.
Build a CQRS boundary for Periodical in TypeScript with handleCommand (Decider + appendToStream) and queryView (reads from a read store). Document that the read store is eventually consistent.
What's the minimum CQRS split for a Catalog aggregate in TypeScript? Show handleCommand writing through a Decider + appendToStream and queryView reading from a read store.

Build a stateless process manager that reacts to AcquisitionOrder events and emits the next command. Cover Placed → ScheduleDelivery, Received → CloseAcquisition. Return null for events the saga ignores.
What's the minimal shape of a stateless process manager for an InterlibraryRequest flow in TypeScript? Show a pure react(event) that returns either the next command or null.
Build a pure translate(domainEvent) function that emits a versioned IntegrationEvent for public LibraryBranch events only. Internal events must return null.

Write an appendWithOutbox function for Periodical that atomically persists events plus an outbox row inside one transaction. Constraints: local Transaction interface, local OutboxRow interface, no 'pg' or 'mysql2' imports, describe the publisher's role in a comment.
Build a small appendToStream helper for ReadingGroup events that wraps an EventStore and converts conflicts into a typed error. Use a local EventStore interface.
How do I drain a readStream into an array of BookLoan events in TypeScript, typed against a local EventStore interface? Show a generic helper.
Refactor this Catalog projection so project becomes a pure function of (view, event), emptyView is a frozen literal, and the unrelated CatalogPublished event passes through unchanged.
